name: SHE Complete
description: Bespoke 100-minute ritual for women combining scalp wellness and advanced hair artistry. Our most comprehensive SHE Time experience for full restoration.

name: SHE Calm
description: A 90-minute personalised ritual designed to calm the scalp and restore balance. Ideal for stress-related hair concerns and sensitive scalps.

name: SHE Rise
description: A 60-minute restorative ritual for women seeking renewal and confidence. Blends scalp care with emotional wellness.

name: EXO Glow
description: 90-minute advanced exosome therapy for luminous, healthy hair. Targets damaged and weakened hair at the cellular level for visible transformation.

name: EXO Root
description: 90-minute exosome treatment targeting hair root strengthening and density improvement. Ideal for thinning hair and hair loss.

name: ScalpEase
description: 75-minute scalp rebalancing treatment for oily, irritated, or dandruff-prone scalps. Restores equilibrium and soothes discomfort.

name: Engenerate
description: 90-minute energising scalp treatment to stimulate hair regrowth and improve density. Science-backed formula targeting dormant follicles.

name: Reset Glow
description: 60-minute restorative ritual to reset and refresh the scalp. A perfect introduction to the Coulisse Heir experience.
